# 🚀 Smart Waste Management Analytics Platform

A full-stack data analytics platform for optimizing urban waste management using visualization, route optimization, and predictive insights.

---

## 🌟 Features

- 📊 Interactive Dashboard (Bar + Pie Charts)
- 🔥 Heatmap Visualization of Waste Density
- 🚛 Truck Route Optimization (Map-based)
- 📍 Bin Location Tracking on Map
- ✏️ Manual Bin Waste Entry (IoT Simulation)
- 🚨 Alert System for Overflow Bins
- 🌐 Live Deployment (Vercel + Backend API)

---

## 🛠 Tech Stack

### Frontend
- React.js (Vite)
- Recharts (Charts)
- React-Leaflet (Maps)

### Backend
- Python (Flask)
- Pandas (Data Processing)

### Tools
- Vercel (Frontend Deployment)
- Render (Backend Deployment)
- GitHub (Version Control)
